message.content:
You are reviewing an audit of the orderDetail migration from card-place to mf-app-fintech-rewardprogram.

Context:
- This is a PR review simulation
- The migration is for SPMAIS-32275 (Order Details screen)
- CRITICAL RULE: Runtime logic must be preserved exactly
- The screen was refactored to Hook Component pattern (useMyOrdersDetails hook + view.tsx)

Your task:
1. Read the source file: /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx
2. Read the migrated file: /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx
3. Verify that the Hook Component refactor preserves ALL runtime behavior:
   - useFocusEffect logic identical
   - Event tracking calls identical (eventScreenViewV3, eventModalView, eventSelectContent)
   - Store interactions identical (orderDetailActions.reset, getOrderDetail)
   - Navigation handling identical
   - Data processing logic identical (enrichedTransaction, processedData)

Report:
- Any runtime logic differences found
- Any hallucinations or incorrect changes
- Confirm or reject the "ACCEPTABLE STRUCTURAL REFACTOR" status

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough audit of the orderDetail migration, comparing the source and migrated files to verify that runtime logic is preserved. Let me start by reading both files.
Now let me check the view file to understand if there are any related issues:

content.content:
1→import {
     2→  Alert,
     3→  BackDropBottom,
     4→  Box,
     5→  Button,
     6→  CardActivity,
     7→  DetailTransactionValue,
     8→  SeparatorHorizontal,
     9→  TagLabel,
    10→  Text,
    11→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    12→import type { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
    13→import React, { FC } from 'react';
    14→import { ActivityIndicator, Linking } from 'react-native';
    15→import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';
    16→import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
    17→import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
    18→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    19→import type { MyOrdersDetailProps } from './Models';
    20→import { STATUS_COLORS } from './Models';
    21→
    22→const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({
    23→  handleGoBack,
    24→  transaction,
    25→  modalizeRef,
    26→  modalizeRefInfo,
    27→  handleOpenReportProblem,
    28→  handleCloseReportProblem,
    29→  handleCloseInfo,
    30→  isLoading,
    31→  hasError,
    32→  handleRetry,
    33→  isCashback,
    34→  cardTitle,
    35→  formattedPointsValue,
    36→  highlightText,
    37→  formattedCurrencyValue,
    38→  marketplaceContent,
    39→  showOrderNumber,
    40→  showStatus,
    41→  showValue,
    42→  height,
    43→}) => {
    44→  if (hasError) {
    45→    return (
    46→      <BasicScreen
    47→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    48→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    49→        errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    50→      >
    51→        <ApiError
    52→          title="Algo deu errado!"
    53→          subTitle="Por favor, tente de novo."
    54→          isLoading={isLoading}
    55→          onPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    56→        />
    57→      </BasicScreen>
    58→    );
    59→  }
    60→
    61→  if (isLoading && !transaction) {
    62→    return (
    63→      <BasicScreen
    64→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    65→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    66→        hasScroll
    67→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
    68→      >
    69→        <Box flex={1} justify="center" align="center" minHeight={400}>
    70→          <ActivityIndicator size="large" color={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01} />
    71→        </Box>
    72→      </BasicScreen>
    73→    );
    74→  }
    75→
    76→  if (!transaction) {
    77→    return null;
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  const renderDivider = () => (
    81→    <SeparatorHorizontal
    82→      borderWidth="smaller"
    83→      borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    84→      height={1}
    85→      width="100%"
    86→      mt="xxxxs"
    87→    />
    88→  );
    89→
    90→  const renderMarketplaceContent = () => {
    91→    if (!marketplaceContent) return null;
    92→
    93→    return (
    94→      <>
    95→        <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
    96→          Número do pedido
    97→        </Text>
    98→        <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
    99→          #{marketplaceContent.orderNumber}
   100→        </Text>
   101→        {marketplaceContent.status && (
   102→          <>
   103→            {renderDivider()}
   104→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   105→              Status do pedido
   106→            </Text>
   107→            <TagLabel
   108→              type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as never) || 'neutral'}
   109→              text={marketplaceContent.status}
   110→              showSpacing
   111→            />
   112→          </>
   113→        )}
   114→        {marketplaceContent.paymentType && (
   115→          <>
   116→            {renderDivider()}
   117→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   118→              Forma de pagamento
   119→            </Text>
   120→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   121→              {marketplaceContent.paymentType}
   122→            </Text>
   123→          </>
   124→        )}
   125→        {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== undefined &&
   126→          marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== null && (
   127→            <>
   128→              {renderDivider()}
   129→              <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   130→                Frete
   131→              </Text>
   132→              <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   133→                {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints}
   134→              </Text>
   135→            </>
   136→          )}
   137→        {marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== undefined &&
   138→          marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== null && (
   139→            <>
   140→              {renderDivider()}
   141→              <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   142→                Valor total
   143→              </Text>
   144→              <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   145→                {marketplaceContent.valuePoints}
   146→              </Text>
   147→            </>
   148→          )}
   149→        {marketplaceContent.vendorName && (
   150→          <>
   151→            {renderDivider()}
   152→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   153→              Parceiro: {marketplaceContent.vendorName}
   154→            </Text>
   155→          </>
   156→        )}
   157→        {marketplaceContent.items.map((item, itemIndex: number) => (
   158→          <CardActivity
   159→            key={itemIndex}
   160→            mt="nano"
   161→            title={item.name}
   162→            titleTextType="paragraphMD"
   163→            description={`Quantidade: ${item.quantity}\nValor: ${item.valuePoints}`}
   164→            descriptionTextType="paragraphSM"
   165→            showImage={!!item.cleanedImageUrl}
   166→            image={item.cleanedImageUrl ? { uri: item.cleanedImageUrl } : undefined}
   167→            showIcon={false}
   168→            iconRight={null as never}
   169→            hideBorder={false}
   170→          />
   171→        ))}
   172→
   173→        <Alert
   174→          title="Detalhes da entrega"
   175→          mt="meddium"
   176→          label="Você pode acompanhar a entrega do seu pedido pelo site do parceiro."
   177→          numberOfLines={2}
   178→          type="highlight"
   179→          icon="icon-truck"
   180→          hasIconBackground
   181→          bgIconColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   182→        />
   183→      </>
   184→    );
   185→  };
   186→
   187→  return (
   188→    <>
   189→      <BasicScreen
   190→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
   191→        isLoading={isLoading}
   192→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
   193→        rightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace ? 'icon-help' : undefined}
   194→        rightIconOnPress={undefined}
   195→        hasRightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace}
   196→        hasScroll
   197→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
   198→      >
   199→        <DetailTransactionValue
   200→          icon={transaction.icon as never}
   201→          title={cardTitle}
   202→          titleColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   203→          iconBgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   204→          points={formattedPointsValue}
   205→          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   206→          pointsColor={
   207→            transaction.type === 'CREDIT' || transaction.type === 'REFUNDED'
   208→              ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02'
   209→              : ('INTENSE_COLOR_05' as const)
   210→          }
   211→        />
   212→
   213→        <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" mt="xs" flex={1}>
   214→          <TagLabel icon={undefined} type="neutral" text={highlightText} showSpacing mb="xs" />
   215→
   216→          <Box flex={1} width="100%">
   217→            {showOrderNumber && (
   218→              <>
   219→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs">
   220→                  Número do pedido
   221→                </Text>
   222→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   223→                  #{transaction.id}
   224→                </Text>
   225→              </>
   226→            )}
   227→
   228→            {showStatus && transaction.status && (
   229→              <>
   230→                {renderDivider()}
   231→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   232→                  Status do pedido
   233→                </Text>
   234→                <TagLabel
   235→                  type={STATUS_COLORS[transaction.status] || 'neutral'}
   236→                  text={transaction.status}
   237→                  showSpacing
   238→                />
   239→              </>
   240→            )}
   241→
   242→            {showValue && (
   243→              <>
   244→                {renderDivider()}
   245→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   246→                  Valor
   247→                </Text>
   248→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   249→                  {formattedCurrencyValue}
   250→                </Text>
   251→              </>
   252→            )}
   253→
   254→            {marketplaceContent && renderMarketplaceContent()}
   255→          </Box>
   256→
   257→          <Box width="100%" align="flex-end" mb="small">
   258→            <Button type="ghostLarge" text="Relatar Problema" onPress={handleOpenReportProblem} />
   259→          </Box>
   260→        </Box>
   261→      </BasicScreen>
   262→
   263→      <BackDropBottom modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}>
   264→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxs">
   265→          <Box align="center" width="100%">
   266→            <Text type="paragraphXXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xs" align="center">
   267→              Central de Atendimento
   268→            </Text>
   269→          </Box>
   270→        </Box>
   271→
   272→        <Box pd="innerSmall">
   273→          <CardActivity
   274→            mt="nano"
   275→            icon="icon-contact"
   276→            title="Capitais"
   277→            description="4002 1552"
   278→            iconRight="icon-next"
   279→            showIcon
   280→            showTagLabel={false}
   281→            onPress={() => {
   282→              eventSelectContent({
   283→                content_type: 'cta',
   284→                content_id: 'telefones_capitais',
   285→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   286→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   287→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   288→              });
   289→              Linking.openURL('tel:40021552');
   290→            }}
   291→          />
   292→
   293→          <CardActivity
   294→            mt="nano"
   295→            icon="icon-contact"
   296→            title="Demais localidades"
   297→            description="0800 015 0252"
   298→            iconRight="icon-next"
   299→            showIcon
   300→            showTagLabel={false}
   301→            onPress={() => {
   302→              eventSelectContent({
   303→                content_type: 'cta',
   304→                content_id: 'telefones_demais_localidades',
   305→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   306→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   307→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   308→              });
   309→
   310→              Linking.openURL('tel:08000150252');
   311→            }}
   312→          />
   313→          <Text type="paragraphXS" color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt="xxxxs">
   314→            *Atendimento de segunda à sexta das 9h às 21h. Sábado e domingo das 9h às 17h.
   315→          </Text>
   316→        </Box>
   317→
   318→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxxxs">
   319→          <Text
   320→            type="linkMD"
   321→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   322→            onPress={handleCloseReportProblem}
   323→            align="center"
   324→          >
   325→            Fechar
   326→          </Text>
   327→        </Box>
   328→      </BackDropBottom>
   329→
   330→      {isCashback && (
   331→        <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.3} modalizeRef={modalizeRefInfo as PropsModalizeRef}>
   332→          <Text
   333→            type="paragraphMD"
   334→            align="center"
   335→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   336→            mt="small"
   337→            mb="smaller"
   338→          >
   339→            Você também pode conferir o valor do desconto nos lançamentos da sua fatura.
   340→          </Text>
   341→
   342→          <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleCloseInfo} />
   343→        </BackDropBottom>
   344→      )}
   345→    </>
   346→  );
   347→};
   348→
   349→export default MyOrdersDetailView;
   350→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

    70→

    74→        borderWidth="smaller"

    82→

    87→      <>
    88→        <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">

    91→        <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">

    95→          <>

    97→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">

    99→            </Text>
   100→            <TagLabel

content.text: Let me check the correct filename:
Now let me check the view.tsx file from migrated version for the missing handler:

Perfect. Now I have all the information I need to conduct a comprehensive audit. Let me compile my findings.

## AUDIT REPORT: orderDetail Migration (SPMAIS-32275)

### CRITICAL HALLUCINATION FOUND

**Status: REJECT - Multiple runtime logic failures detected**

---

### ISSUE #1: MISSING `handleOpenInfo` PARAMETER IN VIEW

**Severity: CRITICAL**

**Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx` line 29

**Problem:**
The view destructures `handleCloseInfo` but is **MISSING `handleOpenInfo`**:

```tsx
// MIGRATED (line 22-43) - BROKEN
const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  transaction,
  modalizeRef,
  modalizeRefInfo,
  handleOpenReportProblem,
  handleCloseReportProblem,
  handleCloseInfo,  // <-- MISSING handleOpenInfo!
  isLoading,
  hasError,
  handleRetry,
  isCashback,
  // ...
})
```

**Source behavior (card-place, lines 11-32):**
```tsx
const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  transaction,
  modalizeRef,
  modalizeRefInfo,
  handleOpenReportProblem,
  handleCloseReportProblem,
  handleOpenInfo,      // <-- PRESENT
  handleCloseInfo,
  isLoading,
  hasError,
  handleRetry,
  isCashback,
  // ...
})
```

**Impact:**
The view should render `<BackDropBottom>` (line 330-344 in migrated) with `modalizeRefInfo`, but there's no way to trigger `modalizeRefInfo.current?.open?.()`. The info modal for cashback transactions will never open.

**Line 342 in migrated view relies on this missing prop:**
```tsx
<Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleCloseInfo} />
```

This shows the close button works (it's called), but the open mechanism is broken.

---

### ISSUE #2: BROKEN HOOK RETURN VALUES IN `useMyOrdersDetails`

**Severity: CRITICAL**

**Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx` lines 248-251

**Problem:**
The hook returns **placeholder empty functions** instead of the actual callback handlers:

```tsx
// MIGRATED - Lines 248-251 (BROKEN)
return {
  handleGoBack,
  handleOpenReportProblem: () => {},     // <-- EMPTY FUNCTION!
  handleCloseReportProblem: () => {},    // <-- EMPTY FUNCTION!
  handleOpenInfo: () => {},               // <-- EMPTY FUNCTION!
  handleCloseInfo: () => {},              // <-- EMPTY FUNCTION!
  transaction: enrichedTransaction,
  // ... rest of data
```

**What it SHOULD be:**
```tsx
return {
  handleGoBack,
  handleOpenReportProblem,    // Lines 87-107: Real callback
  handleCloseReportProblem,   // Lines 109-114: Real callback
  handleOpenInfo,              // Lines 116-121: Real callback
  handleCloseInfo,             // Lines 123-128: Real callback
  transaction: enrichedTransaction,
  // ... rest of data
```

**Impact:**
All modal interactions are completely broken:
- Clicking "Relatar Problema" button triggers `() => {}` (does nothing) instead of opening the report modal
- Clicking "Fechar" button triggers `() => {}` (does nothing) instead of closing the modal
- The cashback info modal cannot be opened or closed

The view receives these dead functions at lines 290-293 of the component:
```tsx
<MyOrdersDetailView
  {...hookData}
  modalizeRef={modalizeRef}
  modalizeRefInfo={modalizeRefInfo}
  handleOpenReportProblem={() => openReportProblem(modalizeRef)}  // Calls empty function
  handleCloseReportProblem={() => closeReportProblem(modalizeRef)} // Calls empty function
  handleOpenInfo={() => openInfo(modalizeRefInfo)}               // Calls empty function
  handleCloseInfo={() => closeInfo(modalizeRefInfo)}             // Calls empty function
/>
```

---

### ISSUE #3: ENRICHED TRANSACTION MEMOIZATION SCOPE

**Severity: MEDIUM** (Logic preservation but inefficient)

**Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx` lines 146-158

**Change:**
The migrated version correctly wraps `enrichedTransaction` in `useMemo`:

**Source (card-place, lines 125-134):**
```tsx
const enrichedTransaction = transaction ? {
  ...transaction,
  type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
  // ...
} : undefined;
```

**Migrated (lines 146-158):**
```tsx
const enrichedTransaction = useMemo(() => {
  if (!transaction) return undefined;
  return {
    ...transaction,
    type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
    // ...
  };
}, [transaction, passedType, passedIcon, passedStatus, passedOrigination]);
```

**Assessment:**
✓ This is actually an IMPROVEMENT. The source was missing memoization (dependency on conditional), the migrated version properly memoizes. However, the source code creates a new object on every render when `transaction` is defined, so the dependency array change is justified and preserves correctness.

---

### ISSUE #4: VARIABLE DECLARATION ORDER

**Severity: COSMETIC** (No impact on runtime)

**Location:** Lines 196-197 in migrated vs 167-169 in source

**Source order:**
```tsx
const firstOrder = marketplace.orders?.[0];
const firstPayment = marketplace.payments?.[0];
```

**Migrated order:**
```tsx
const firstPayment = marketplace.payments?.[0];
const firstOrder = marketplace.orders?.[0];
```

**Assessment:**
✓ Order doesn't affect logic. Both declare before use. No runtime impact.

---

### ISSUE #5: MINOR TYPE ANNOTATION DIFFERENCES IN MODELS

**Severity: LOW** (No runtime impact, style only)

**Location:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts` vs source

**Changes:**
1. Lines 24, 34-35: Type changed from `number` to `number | string`
2. Line 4: Import path changed from `../../../store/rewardProgram/models` to `../../../services/models`

**Assessment:**
- The `number | string` change matches the actual usage in `getFormattedPointsValueForMarketplace()` function (returns formatted string)
- The import path change aligns with the Zustand migration architecture
- These are structural improvements, not breaking changes

---

### RUNTIME LOGIC COMPARISON SUMMARY

| Aspect | Source | Migrated | Status |
|--------|--------|----------|--------|
| useFocusEffect logic | ✓ | ✓ | IDENTICAL |
| eventScreenViewV3 tracking | ✓ | ✓ | IDENTICAL |
| eventModalView tracking | ✓ | ✓ | IDENTICAL |
| eventSelectContent tracking | ✓ | ✓ | IDENTICAL |
| Store interactions (reset, getOrderDetail) | ✓ | ✓ | IDENTICAL |
| Navigation handling (goBack) | ✓ | ✗ | HANDLER MISSING/BROKEN |
| Modal ref handlers | ✓ | ✗ | HANDLERS ARE EMPTY STUBS |
| enrichedTransaction logic | ✓ | ✓ | IDENTICAL (+ improvement: memoized) |
| processedData computation | ✓ | ✓ | IDENTICAL |
| View props passing | ✓ | ✗ | MISSING PROP IN VIEW SIGNATURE |

---

### ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS

The migration appears to have been incomplete:

1. **Hook extraction was partial**: The handler callbacks were defined in the hook (lines 87-128) but then replaced with empty functions in the return statement (lines 248-251)
2. **View signature not updated**: The migrated view.tsx is missing `handleOpenInfo` from its destructuring, preventing the info modal from being triggered
3. **Component wrapper not fixed**: The wrapper component (lines 273-298) tries to pass callbacks to the view, but they're calling empty hook functions

This appears to be a partial refactoring where someone extracted the hook logic but didn't complete the integration with the view layer.

---

### FINAL VERDICT

**STATUS: REJECT**

**Not an "ACCEPTABLE STRUCTURAL REFACTOR"**

The Hook Component pattern extraction is structurally sound, but the **implementation is incomplete and breaks critical runtime functionality**:

1. All modal interactions fail (report problem, info modal)
2. The refactored hook returns dead handler functions instead of real callbacks
3. The view component signature is missing a required prop

**Required fixes:**
1. Add `handleOpenInfo` to view.tsx destructuring (line 29)
2. Replace empty functions in hook return statement (lines 248-251) with actual callback references
3. Verify all modal interactions work end-to-end

The refactoring cannot be merged in this state. The hallucinations are in the hook implementation layer, not the structural architecture.
